text:
Top 20 AI Assessment Tools in 2026

Organizations increasingly rely on AI-powered assessment tools for evaluation needs. These platforms utilize machine learning and adaptive testing to assess candidates across technical, cognitive, and soft skills. Beyond hiring, they support employee development and performance management.

Top 20 AI Assessment Tools in 2026:
1. WeCP (We Create Problems) - Creates job-specific questions tailored to skills, covers 2000+ programming languages, frameworks, and tools. Includes Sherlock AI proctoring for fraud detection and comprehensive communication assessments.
2. Codility - Provides robust coding tests with AI-powered grading and quick accurate results.
3. HackerRank - Features thousands of coding challenges across various domains and difficulty levels.
4. HireVue - Combines video interviews with AI-powered assessment, analyzing verbal and non-verbal cues.
5. Testlify - Offers 3,500+ assessments covering 5,000+ job roles and skills with 20+ proctoring and anti-cheating features.
6. Pymetrics - Uses neuroscience-based assessments combining AI with behavioral science.
7. Mettl - Provides assessments covering cognitive, technical, and behavioral skills.
8. SHL - A global leader offering tests for cognitive, technical, and behavioral skills.
9. Talview - Features automated video interviews with AI analysis.
10. HireRight - Specializes in background screening.
11. Criteria Corp - Delivers tests for cognitive abilities, personality traits, and job-specific skills.
12. CodinGame - Offers engaging coding games to evaluate technical skills.
13. Harver - Uses AI-driven insights to match candidates with best-fit roles.
14. Glider AI - Combines real-world coding problems with AI-analyzed video interviews.
15. TestGorilla - Provides subscription plans with problem-solving and personality assessments.
16. HackerEarth - Offers real-world problems to assess coding skills plus hackathons.
17. eSkill - Delivers customizable pre-employment assessments.
18. Talogy - Offers wide range of customizable assessments.
19. iMocha - Provides coding challenges, language proficiency tests, and cognitive assessments.
20. Cognify - Features interactive games that assess cognitive abilities.
